title: She Said
logline: Two New York Times journalists investigate Harvey Weinstein's decades of sexual harassment and assault, breaking through a web of silence, legal threats, and institutional cover-ups to expose one of Hollywood's most powerful predators.
antagonistOrConflict: Harvey Weinstein and the system of silence protecting him
themes: Courage in the face of intimidation

actBreaks.description: The investigation officially begins as Jodi and Megan are assigned to work together on the Weinstein story after gathering initial evidence.

validation.ruling: Scene #75 shows Megan deciding to join Jodi on the Weinstein investigation after discussing her postpartum struggles with Rebecca, fundamentally changing the story's direction by bringing together the two protagonists who will drive the investigation forward.

actBreaks.description: The final editorial meeting where the decision is made to publish the story despite legal threats and pressure.

validation.ruling: Scene #158 shows Dean Baquet and the team reading Lauren O'Connor's explosive memo detailing Weinstein's abuse, with Dean declaring 'Go write. It's time to write' - this irreversibly shifts the story from investigation to publication mode with the smoking gun evidence they need.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This is a methodical investigative thriller that builds tension through accumulating evidence rather than traditional action beats. The structure mirrors real journalism - starting with fragments and rumors, then systematically building a case through interviews, corroboration, and legal maneuvering. The script uses a mosaic approach, weaving together multiple timelines and perspectives (Venice 1998, Ireland 1992, present day 2017) to show the scope and history of abuse. The pacing accelerates as sources begin to speak on record and legal pressure mounts.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The first act establishes the journalists' separate investigations before they unite. The middle section (scenes 75-158) intensifies through key interviews with Zelda Perkins, Laura Madden, and other sources, punctuated by Weinstein's escalating intimidation tactics. The final act compresses time as publication deadlines loom and last-minute sources emerge.

incitingIncident.description: Jodi tells Rebecca and Matt that activist Shaunna Thomas connected Rose McGowan's rape allegations to Harvey Weinstein specifically.

validation.ruling: Scene #42 is too general - just a brainstorming meeting about workplace harassment. Scene #43 is the true inciting incident where Jodi tells Rebecca and Matt that Rose McGowan's rape allegations are specifically connected to Harvey Weinstein, launching the central investigation that drives the entire story.

midpoint.description: Jodi meets with Zelda Perkins at a London restaurant, where Zelda reveals details about working for Weinstein and shows documents in her bag, ultimately agreeing to go on the record.
midpoint.sceneHeading: INT. A NICE RESTAURANT. LONDON. UK. DAY.

validation.ruling: Scene #119 is a perfect midpoint where Zelda Perkins reveals crucial details about Harvey Weinstein's behavior to Jodi in London, representing the point of no return as the investigation shifts from reactive information gathering to proactive pursuit of on-the-record sources with concrete evidence.

climax.description: The team fields another call from Harvey Weinstein who threatens to give an interview to the Washington Post, while Dean Baquet enters and tells Harvey he's about to push the button to publish.
climax.sceneHeading: INT. NYT - NEW CONFERENCE ROOM (STAGE). DAY.

validation.ruling: Scene #194 is the climax where Dean Baquet directly confronts Harvey Weinstein on the phone, telling him 'I'm about to push the button' and demanding his final statement before publication - this is the ultimate confrontation that resolves the main story question of whether they can publish despite Weinstein's intimidation.

scenes.heading: INT. A CLUB. VENICE. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Zelda Perkins and Rowena Chiu dance together at a Venice club in 1998, enjoying themselves to Bowie music.

scenes.heading: EXT. THE LIDO. VENICE. DAWN.
scenes.summary: Zelda sits on a Venice beach at dawn smoking while Rowena sleeps beside her, and two Italian men wave at them as they pass.

scenes.heading: INT. A CORRIDOR. A CHIC HOTEL. VENICE. MORNING.
scenes.summary: Rowena arrives at Zelda's hotel door traumatized and shaking, breaking down in tears as Zelda tries to comfort her.

scenes.heading: EXT. WOODED AREA. IRELAND. DAY.
scenes.summary: Laura Madden walks through Irish woods with her dog in 1992.

scenes.heading: EXT. SHORELINE. BY THE WATER. IRELAND. DAY.
scenes.summary: Laura emerges from the woods onto a beach and discovers a film production with period ships and soldiers.

scenes.heading: EXT. A FILM SHOOT. IRELAND. DAY.
scenes.summary: Laura works on the film set carrying water crates with a colleague, then walks toward a horse alone.

scenes.heading: INT. A SHOWER CUBICLE. A CHEAP HOTEL ROOM. DUBLIN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Laura stands alone in a hotel shower, numb and static, letting shampoo foam fall into her eyes without reacting.

scenes.heading: EXT. BROOKLYN & MANHATTAN STREETS. NEW YORK. DAY.
scenes.summary: Various women walk through New York streets in 2017 while Trump's Access Hollywood tape plays as soundtrack, including Jodi Kantor on her phone.

scenes.heading: EXT. COUNTRYSIDE, LA., CALIFORNIA. DAY.
scenes.summary: A woman runs intensely through the California countryside, pushing herself through a rigorous workout.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - NEWSROOM - 3RD FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi leaves a voicemail for Rowena asking for a chance to talk, then the title 'She Said' appears.
scenes.turningPointNote: Title card establishes the main investigation beginning

scenes.heading: EXT. A STREET. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Megan Twohey walks alone on a Brooklyn street at night, quickening her pace when she sees a lurking man, then notices a helicopter with a searchlight overhead.

scenes.heading: INT. A CAFE. NEW YORK. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan interviews Rachel Crooks in a cafe about going public with her Trump allegations, discussing the life-changing consequences.

scenes.heading: INT. A BEDROOM. A HOUSE. TORONTO, CANADA. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi uses a breast pump while staying with Syrian refugee families in Toronto, sharing a laugh with a mother and toddler.

scenes.heading: INT. AN AIRPORT HOTEL. TORONTO, CANADA. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi observes Syrian refugee families arriving at a Toronto airport hotel with their belongings in plastic bags.

scenes.heading: EXT. COUNTRYSIDE, L.A., CALIFORNIA. DAY.
scenes.summary: The same running woman finishes her circuit and lies down on moss, breathing heavily with her face covered.

scenes.heading: INT. A MEDICAL ROOM. A HOSPITAL. SWANSEA. WALES. DAY.
scenes.summary: Laura Madden receives devastating news from a doctor that she needs a full mastectomy within two weeks.

scenes.heading: INT. KITCHEN. LAURA MADDEN’S HOUSE. SWANSEA, WALES. DAY.
scenes.summary: Laura comforts her crying daughter Nell while preparing vegetables, then embraces both daughters as her younger children play obliviously.

scenes.heading: EXT. A STREET. BROOKLYN. EVENING.
scenes.summary: Jodi walks through Brooklyn streets during a violent storm with heavy rain and wind.

scenes.heading: EXT. A BALCONY. JODI’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. EVENING.
scenes.summary: Jodi and her daughter Talia stand on their balcony in nightclothes during the thunderstorm, with Talia recording the sounds.

scenes.heading: INT. MEGAN’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. EVENING.
scenes.summary: Megan types at her laptop during the storm, realizes she's late, and texts someone while cursing under her breath.

scenes.heading: EXT. A STREET BY A PROSPECT HEIGHTS BAR. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Megan rushes through the rain to a bar and spots Vadim waiting alone inside, looking at each other through the window.

scenes.heading: INT. A BAR. PROSPECT HEIGHTS, BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Megan approaches Vadim's table wet from rain, initially panicking that he might not be her blind date before he confirms he is.

scenes.heading: INT. JODI’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi tries to leave her apartment but her toddler Violet clings to her leg until older sister Talia helps lead her away.

scenes.heading: INT. A SUBWAY TRAIN CARRIAGE. NEW YORK. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi rides a crowded subway while reading research on her tablet and observing the gender dynamics of space-taking among passengers.

scenes.heading: INT. A BEDROOM. VADIM’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. EVENING. / INT.
scenes.summary: Megan and Vadim are in bed when Rachel Crooks calls to confirm she'll go on the record about Trump's assault.

scenes.heading: INT. A LIVING ROOM. VADIM’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Megan listens to Trump interviews through earbuds while Vadim brings her tea, showing their growing intimacy.

scenes.heading: INT. A BATHROOM. VADIM’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Megan joins Vadim in the bath where he admits being nervous and distracted by their relationship, and she mentions wanting children.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - JODI’S DESK - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi and Megan work at separate desks in the NYT investigation unit, briefly making eye contact before returning to their computers.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT NEWSROOM - 3RD FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi walks through the NYT newsroom and exchanges a charged look with Ron Lieber at his desk.

scenes.heading: INT. MEGAN AND VADIM’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. EVENING.
scenes.summary: Megan sits in pajamas feeling nauseous while checking emails, with Vadim asking about her sickness and waiting for Trump's response.

scenes.heading: EXT. STREETS. FLORIDA. EVENING.
scenes.summary: Establishing shot of sexualized advertisements and palm trees along a Florida road.

scenes.heading: INT. BACKSTAGE AT PRESIDENTIAL CAMPAIGN. FLORIDA. EVENING.
scenes.summary: Trump is prepared backstage for a campaign appearance and signals to wait before going on stage.

scenes.heading: INT. MEGAN AND VADIM’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. EVENING
scenes.summary: Trump calls Megan directly, shocking her as he denies knowing the women and questions why they didn't go to police.

scenes.heading: EXT. A POLITICAL RALLY. FLORIDA. DAY.
scenes.summary: Trump addresses a rally crowd, claiming the corrupt media is working against the American people and calling coverage libelous.

scenes.heading: INT. RACHEL CROOKS’S HOUSE. OHIO. DAY.
scenes.summary: Rachel Crooks looks out at reporters covering her lawn and receives a package containing excrement, recoiling in disgust.

scenes.heading: INT. A PRE-NATAL CLINIC. BROOKLYN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan takes a call from Rachel while at a prenatal clinic with Vadim, then receives another call from Bill O'Reilly's show.

scenes.heading: INT. JODI’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi packs maternity clothes into a tote bag while Ron questions if she wants another child.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - MEGAN’S DESK - 4TH FL. EVENING.
scenes.summary: Megan works late at her desk and leaves without noticing the maternity clothes Jodi left for her.

scenes.heading: INT. MEGAN AND VADIM’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Megan feels too nauseous to eat while watching Bill O'Reilly call her a feminist on TV, then leaves to get noodles.

scenes.heading: EXT. INTERSECTION. BROOKLYN. NEW YORK. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Megan receives a threatening phone call from a man promising to rape and murder her while walking alone at night.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT NEWSROOM (BY PAGE ONE) - 3RD FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi joins NYT journalists including Dean Baquet and Rebecca Corbett watching TV coverage about Bill O'Reilly.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - NEW CONFERENCE ROOM (STAGE). DAY.
scenes.summary: Rebecca leads a brainstorming meeting with journalists including Jodi about investigating sexual harassment across various workplaces and industries.
scenes.turningPointNote: The investigation scope expands beyond Trump to workplace harassment broadly

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - CAFE - 14TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi tells Rebecca and Matt that activist Shaunna Thomas connected Rose McGowan's rape allegations to Harvey Weinstein specifically.
scenes.turningPointNote: Harvey Weinstein is first identified as the target of investigation

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - JODI’S DESK - 4TH FL. DAY
scenes.summary: Jodi sits at her desk and begins typing an email that starts 'Dear Rose.'

scenes.heading: INT. JODI’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi studies photos of actresses on red carpets and discovers an actual casting couch sculpture exists in Los Angeles.

scenes.heading: INT. A BEDROOM. JODI’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi watches Ashley Judd's Women's March performance and tells Ron that Judd wrote about harassment by a famous producer without naming him.

scenes.heading: INT. AN ULTRASOUND OFFICE. HOSPITAL. BROOKLYN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan and Vadim listen to their unborn daughter's heartbeat during an ultrasound appointment.

scenes.heading: INT. INVESTIGATION - JODI’S DESK - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi calls a former Miramax employee asking about sexual harassment and Harvey Weinstein, with the woman asking if she's being recorded.

scenes.heading: INT. JODI’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi receives a callback from Mary, a Miramax ex-employee, who warns that people won't want to talk about Harvey.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - JODI’S DESK - 4TH FL. DAY
scenes.summary: Jodi calls Rose McGowan directly about Harvey Weinstein, but Rose declines to speak and begins to explain why not.

scenes.heading: EXT. THE NEW YORK TIMES BUILDING. DAY.
scenes.summary: Rebecca exits the New York Times building and embraces her daughter Molly who waits for her outside.

scenes.heading: INT. AN ITALIAN DINER / BAR. MANHATTAN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Rebecca and Molly have lunch at an Italian diner where Rebecca uncharacteristically brings up Molly's past workplace bullying and expresses unusual praise, making Molly worry she might be ill.

scenes.heading: INT. HALLWAY. HOSPITAL. BROOKLYN. SUNSET.
scenes.summary: Megan holds her crying newborn daughter Mira in a hospital hallway, unable to access joy due to intense postpartum depression.

scenes.heading: INT. A ROOM. THE HAMPTON INN. MANHATTAN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Rebecca hangs up her coat and removes her necklace in her hotel room at the Hampton Inn, which serves as her home away from home.

scenes.heading: EXT. HOSPITAL. BROOKLYN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Vadim straps baby Mira into their car while Megan walks away from the vehicle in a troubled, blank state until Vadim calls her back.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - JODI’S DESK - 4TH FLOOR. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi checks her appearance in a mirror at her desk, then walks toward the occupied Investigation Conference room where colleagues wave at her.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - NEW CONFERENCE ROOM (STAGE). DAY
scenes.summary: Jodi calls Ashley Judd via video and they exchange warm greetings as Ashley agrees to talk.

scenes.heading: INT. ASHLEY JUDD’S APARTMENT. LOS ANGELES. DAY.
scenes.summary: Ashley Judd describes going to meet Weinstein at the Peninsula Hotel, expecting to meet in the restaurant but being directed to his hotel suite instead, where he appeared in a bathrobe.

scenes.heading: EXT. THE STREETS OF LOS ANGELES. DAY.
scenes.summary: As Ashley continues her account of Weinstein's increasingly sexual requests and her repeated refusals, we see images of Los Angeles streets filled with advertising of perfect female bodies.

scenes.heading: INT. MEGAN AND VADIM’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Vadim holds baby Mira while trying to comfort the deeply troubled Megan, who expresses doubt about her ability to cope and describes feeling constant dread.

scenes.heading: INT. JODI’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. LATE AFTERNOON.
scenes.summary: Jodi cooks while Talia does homework and asks about NDAs, leading to a conversation about secrets where Talia asks what Jodi's secret is.

scenes.heading: INT. A ROOM. THE HAMPTON INN. MANHATTAN. MORNING.
scenes.summary: Rebecca exits her hotel room early in the morning and walks down the corridor.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - ATRIUM/ NEWSROOM/ REBECCA’S OFF. 3RD&4TH FL. DAWN.
scenes.summary: Rebecca enters the dark, empty NYT office at dawn, activating the lights and plugging in her laptop.

scenes.heading: INT. PROSPECT PARK BROOKLYN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi walks in Prospect Park with Talia and a friend while speaking to French actress Judith Godreche, who declines to be involved on advice from her immigration lawyer.

scenes.heading: INT. MEGAN AND VADIM’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan struggles alone with crying baby Mira, calling Vadim to ask him to come home and having difficulty with breastfeeding.

scenes.heading: INT. MEGAN AND VADIM’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. EVENING.
scenes.summary: Megan holds sleeping Mira while crying silently, having to suppress her emotional breakdown to avoid waking the baby.

scenes.heading: INT. JODI’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. LATE AFTERNOON.
scenes.summary: Rose McGowan calls Jodi and describes a worldwide machine of victim-shaming and payouts across studios, while Jodi gives Talia the Netflix code to watch something.
scenes.turningPointNote: Rose McGowan makes contact and reveals the scope of the systemic abuse network

scenes.heading: INT. JODI’S APARTMENT. BEDROOM. LATE AFTERNOON.
scenes.summary: Rose continues her account to Jodi, describing how a supposed business meeting was moved from a restaurant to Weinstein's hotel suite, where unfriendly men directed her to his living room.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - REBECCA’S OFFICE - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi tells Rebecca that Weinstein settled with Rose for one hundred thousand dollars, which Rose donated to a rape crisis center, and Rebecca emphasizes finding documentation.

scenes.heading: INT. A BEDROOM. JODI’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi lies in bed looking at photos of Rose McGowan from her younger, happy days at Sundance compared to her older, different-styled appearance.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - STAIRS - 4TH FL. DAY. / INT. MEGAN
scenes.summary: Jodi calls Megan to check on her, revealing she also had postpartum depression with her first daughter, while Megan struggles in her chaotic apartment with baby Mira.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - REBECCA’S OFFICE - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi tells Rebecca that lawyer Lisa Bloom wrote to her, and Rebecca asks if Jodi wants a partner on the Weinstein story, specifically mentioning Megan Twohey's return.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - JODI’S DESK - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Emily Steel shows Jodi a printout revealing that Lisa Bloom, Gloria Allred's daughter, is working with Weinstein to produce her book, shocking Jodi.

scenes.heading: EXT./INT. NYT - IN FRONT OF ENTRANCE AND RECEPTION. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan approaches the NYT building with energy and walks through reception, excited to return to work.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - MATT PURDY’S OFFICE - 3RD FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan meets with Rebecca and Matt Purdy, who offer her the choice between continuing Trump coverage or joining Jodi on the Weinstein investigation, and she chooses Weinstein.
scenes.turningPointNote: Megan officially joins the Weinstein investigation, forming the reporting partnership

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - COFFEE STATION - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi and Megan get coffee together as Jodi explains her focus on famous actresses, while Megan questions whether this is the best use of their time compared to helping people without voices.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - CONFERENCE ROOM - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Through office windows, Megan and Jodi are seen dividing files and discussing their investigation strategy with Rebecca.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - NEW CONFERENCE ROOM (STAGE). DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan calls a government official about a 2001 Miramax complaint that was closed the same day, learning that all records are destroyed after three years and she cannot get the complainant's name.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - CAFE - 14TH FL. LUNCHTIME.
scenes.summary: Jodi and Megan have coffee in the NYT cafe, discussing their progress including Lisa Bloom's dismissive comments about Rose and connections through Lena Dunham and Jenni Konner.

scenes.heading: EXT. NEW YORK STREET. DAY.
scenes.summary: Lisa Bloom exits an expensive restaurant and waits for a car pickup.

scenes.heading: EXT. NEW YORK MIDTOWN STREET. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan and Jodi head toward two different delis next to each other on a New York street.

scenes.heading: EXT. NEW YORK MIDTOWN STREET. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan and Jodi eat lunch against a wall near the subway entrance, with Megan having a bacon sandwich and Jodi drinking soup.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - MEGAN’S DESK - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Rebecca, Jodi and Megan debrief while eating chocolate almonds, with Megan showing a photo of a former Miramax assistant who disappeared, leaving only her running shoes.

scenes.heading: INT. MEGAN’S CAR. CORONA, QUEENS. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan drives through Corona, Queens in the heat, drinking water and listening to Beyoncé's "Flawless."

scenes.heading: EXT. AN APARTMENT BLOCK. QUEENS. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan rings a doorbell in Queens and is shocked when the former Miramax assistant herself answers instead of her mother, leading to a tense conversation where the scared woman eventually agrees to talk.
scenes.turningPointNote: Megan finds the disappeared Miramax assistant, a key witness who agrees to talk

scenes.heading: EXT. A STREET. QUEENS. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan calls Jodi excitedly about the terrified assistant wanting to talk, while Jodi shares that Gwyneth Paltrow called about an incident at the Peninsula Hotel.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROADS IN NEW YORK. EVENING.
scenes.summary: Megan drives toward a sign reading Riverdale in the evening.

scenes.heading: EXT. A SUBURBAN STREET. RIVERDALE. NY. EVENING.
scenes.summary: Megan waits in her car watching a house in Riverdale, slouching down when a security patrol drives by.

scenes.heading: EXT. A HOUSE. A SUBURBAN STREET. RIVERDALE. NY. EVENING.
scenes.summary: A man arrives home and lights go on in the house, prompting Megan to approach and ring the doorbell, where John Schmidt answers and lets her in.

scenes.heading: INT. A HALLWAY. A HOUSE. RIVERDALE. NY. EVENING.
scenes.summary: Megan enters the Schmidt home and asks John, former Miramax CFO, about payouts to women, while his wife asks what payouts and John realizes he'll be interrogated.

scenes.heading: EXT. JODI’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan waits outside Jodi's Brooklyn apartment in a white dress, meeting Jodi who emerges in a similar white dress, and they joke about being "reporting twins."

scenes.heading: EXT. A HIGHWAY. NEW YORK STATE. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan's car speeds along a New York State highway.

scenes.heading: EXT. A HIGHWAY NEAR THE HAMPTONS. NY. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan's car drives past a sign for The Hamptons while Amy Winehouse's "Back to Black" plays.

scenes.heading: EXT. RESIDENTIAL ROADS. THE HAMPTONS. NY. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan and Jodi drive through impressive Hamptons roads lined with mansions.

scenes.heading: EXT. A LARGE HOUSE. THE HAMPTONS. NY. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan and Jodi arrive at a large Hamptons house where Gwyneth's assistant greets them and leads them to the backyard, with sounds of children playing in a pool.

scenes.heading: EXT. BEHIND THE HOUSE. THE HAMPTONS. NY. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan and Jodi, in their matching white dresses, sit at a table by the pool while Gwyneth's assistant says she'll be right with them.

scenes.heading: INT. MEGAN’S CAR. THE HAMPTONS. NEW YORK STATE. DAY.
scenes.summary: Driving back from the Hamptons, energized Megan and Jodi discuss Gwyneth's account of the same pattern - hotel room meeting, job threats - while Rebecca asks if she'll go on record.
scenes.turningPointNote: Gwyneth Paltrow confirms the pattern of abuse, providing crucial corroboration

scenes.heading: EXT. A SUMMER COTTAGE. WATER MILL. NY. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi and Megan approach another house in Water Mill, whispering about who should take the lead before a woman answers the door and her expression changes when they mention Harvey Weinstein.

scenes.heading: EXT. A PARK. BROOKLYN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Vadim walks with baby Mira in a sling, touching her hand with a leaf, while Megan follows behind on the phone discussing EEOC information access restrictions.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - REBECCA'S OFFICE - 4TH FL. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Rebecca, Jodi and Megan meet at night to discuss the Ambra Battilana Gutierrez case, where she accused Weinstein of groping but the DA wouldn't prosecute despite NYPD giving her a wire.

scenes.heading: INT. A HOTEL CORRIDOR. NEW YORK. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Audio recording of Ambra Battilana Gutierrez and Weinstein plays over empty hotel corridors, with Weinstein demanding she come to his room and her repeatedly refusing.

scenes.heading: EXT. A STREET. MANHATTAN. DAY. / INT. AN UPMARKET OFFICE.
scenes.summary: Megan calls Linda Fairstein about the police complaint against Weinstein, but Fairstein's tone turns cold and she claims there was no criminal conduct.

scenes.heading: EXT. A BROOKLYN SQUARE. EVENING.
scenes.summary: Gwyneth calls Jodi in distress because Weinstein has unexpectedly shown up at her gathering, believing she spoke to the reporters.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT NEWSROOM - BY MATT’S OFFICE - 3RD FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi and Megan walk with intent toward Matt Purdy's office.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - MATT PURDY’S OFFICE - 3RD FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi and Megan explain to Matt Purdy and Rebecca how NDAs create a system of cash for silence that enables abusers to continue.

scenes.heading: INT. JODI’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. EVENING.
scenes.summary: Jodi participates in Sabbath dinner with her family, blessing her daughters Talia and Violet.

scenes.heading: INT. MEGAN AND VADIM’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Megan works on her laptop in bed while her family sleeps around her.

scenes.heading: INT. AN ITALIAN DINER / BAR. MANHATTAN. DAY.
scenes.summary: At a diner, Jodi receives a text revealing that Ronan Farrow is working on a Harvey Weinstein story for the New Yorker and has already spoken to actresses.
scenes.turningPointNote: Competition emerges - another journalist is pursuing the same story, creating urgency

scenes.heading: INT. A FRENCH CAFE. NEW YORK. DAY.
scenes.summary: An ex-Miramax executive tells Jodi about an incident in Venice and describes how Weinstein built a system of silence through fear and intimidation.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - REBECCA’S OFFICE - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Rebecca tells Jodi to travel in person to meet the three women who won't take her calls - Rowena Chiu, Zelda Perkins, and Laura Madden.

scenes.heading: EXT. A ROAD IN THE BAY AREA. CALIFORNIA. DAY.
scenes.summary: A red rental car drives along the coast in the Bay Area.

scenes.heading: EXT. A CAR. ROADS IN THE BAY AREA. CALIFORNIA. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi drives while listening to music with the rental agreement beside her.

scenes.heading: EXT. A HIGHWAY. SILICON VALLEY. CALIFORNIA. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi drives past a University Avenue road sign in Silicon Valley.

scenes.heading: EXT. A RESIDENTIAL STREET. SILICON VALLEY. CALIFORNIA. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi approaches Andrew Cheung in his driveway and learns that his wife Rowena is in England, then discusses the Miramax story with him.

scenes.heading: EXT. A RESIDENTIAL STREET. SILICON VALLEY. CALIFORNIA.DAY. /
scenes.summary: Jodi parks around the corner and calls Megan, expressing frustration about how Rowena kept such a secret and worrying about London.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - MEGAN’S DESK - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan encourages Jodi from her desk, dismissing the UK lawyer's warnings about NDAs.

scenes.heading: EXT. A COASTAL ROAD. CALIFORNIA. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi walks by the ocean and calls Laura Madden, who sounds tired and abstracted when she answers.

scenes.heading: EXT. HEATHROW AIRPORT. LONDON. DAWN.
scenes.summary: Jodi arrives at Heathrow Airport pulling a large suitcase toward the cab stand.

scenes.heading: INT. A NICE RESTAURANT. LONDON. UK. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi meets with Zelda Perkins at a London restaurant, where Zelda reveals details about working for Weinstein and shows documents in her bag, ultimately agreeing to go on the record.
scenes.turningPointNote: First major source agrees to go on the record with documents - breakthrough moment

scenes.heading: INT. A NIGHT CLUB. LONDON. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Young Zelda stands traumatized in a nightclub, clutching her briefcase with documents, crying and out of place among the dancing crowd.

scenes.heading: INT. A HOTEL ROOM. LONDON. UK. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi video calls with her daughter Talia from her London hotel room, discussing her work and Talia's casual use of the word rape.

scenes.heading: INT. FRONT ROOM. LAURA MADDEN’S HOUSE. SWANSEA, WALES. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Laura watches TV with her son when her daughter reports another call from America, this time from Pamela Lubell who worked with Laura.

scenes.heading: INT. KITCHEN. LAURA MADDEN’S HOUSE. SWANSEA, WALES. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Laura speaks with Pamela Lubell, who warns her not to talk to reporters about Harvey and suggests it could hurt other people.

scenes.heading: INT. RECEPTION. HOTEL. UK. LONDON. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi excitedly books a flight to Cornwall at the hotel reception, extending her stay and ignoring a call from Diana Filip.

scenes.heading: INT. A TRAIN. TEIGNMOUTH. DEVON. UK. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi looks out the train window at the sea and red rocks, relaxing briefly and putting her phone down.

scenes.heading: EXT. A BEACH. NEWQUAY. CORNWALL. UK. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi drags her large wheelie bag across the beach past surfers and swimmers, heading toward a distant cafe.

scenes.heading: EXT. A BEACH CAFE. NEWQUAY. CORNWALL. UK. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi meets Laura Madden at a beach cafe, where Laura describes meeting Weinstein in Dublin and being charmed initially.

scenes.heading: INT. A CAFE. DUBLIN. 1992. IRELAND. DAY.
scenes.summary: Young Laura sits hopefully in a Dublin cafe, excited about her future, while her older voice describes the assault that followed.

scenes.heading: INT. A HOTEL ROOM. DUBLIN. IRELAND. DAY.
scenes.summary: A hotel room shows the aftermath of assault - scattered belongings and the sound of a young woman crying in the shower while Weinstein masturbates.

scenes.heading: EXT. A STREET IN DUBLIN. 1992. IRELAND. DAY.
scenes.summary: Laura runs frantically through Dublin streets in a traumatized state, her heart pounding and breathing fast like an animal.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - DEAN BAQUET’S OFFICE - 3RD FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Dean Baquet receives a call from Harvey Weinstein, who tries to speak to him directly about the story rather than the reporters.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - NEW CONFERENCE ROOM (STAGE). DAY.
scenes.summary: The team briefs Dean on their progress, including Zelda's documents and Rose McGowan's settlement, while noting they still lack on-the-record sources.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - ATRIUM CONFERENCE ROOM - 3RD FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Lanny Davis, Weinstein's lawyer, meets with the reporters and admits Harvey is aware of complaints about his treatment of women and acknowledges settlements exist.
scenes.turningPointNote: Weinstein's lawyer admits to settlements - major confirmation of the story's validity

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - ATRIUM HALLWAY - 3RD FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: The team celebrates the breakthrough with Lanny Davis while Jodi dismisses persistent calls from Diana Filip.

scenes.heading: INT. A SMALL WINDOWLESS OFFICE. NY. DAY.
scenes.summary: Diana Filip, revealed as working with an Israeli agent, reports her failure to reach Jodi while being paid to kill the story.

scenes.heading: INT. JODI’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. NIGHT. / INT. MEGAN AND
scenes.summary: Jodi receives an anonymous tip about Irwin Reiter while in bed, then calls Megan to discuss this new lead.

scenes.heading: EXT. A PARK. BROOKLYN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Irwin Reiter calls Jodi to arrange a meeting with specific conditions.

scenes.heading: INT. LITTLE PARK RESTAURANT. MANHATTAN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi meets with nervous accountant Irwin Reiter, who confirms settlements were paid and reveals details about company operations and intimidation tactics.
scenes.turningPointNote: Key insider source confirms financial details and company complicity in the cover-up

scenes.heading: EXT. A STREET. TRIBECA. MANHATTAN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi leaves the restaurant and notices a dark car following her as she walks quickly to the subway.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - CAFE - 14TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan meets with Lanny Davis and gets him to inadvertently confirm settlement amounts are significant when he says it's not forty million.

scenes.heading: EXT. NEW YORK MIDTOWN STREET. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi and Megan walk together, expressing fears about completing the story and discussing the broader implications of systemic abuse.

scenes.heading: EXT. NEW YORK MIDTOWN STREET. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi and Megan separate to go into different delis.

scenes.heading: EXT. BRYANT PARK. MANHATTAN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi and Megan eat lunch in Bryant Park, discussing maternity clothes and Ashley Judd's comments about bonobo apes.

scenes.heading: INT. LITTLE PARK RESTAURANT. MANHATTAN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Irwin tells Jodi about a scathing memo sent by an ex-assistant to the board that was covered up, and mentions threats made to employees.

scenes.heading: INT. JODI’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi arrives home late to find Ron stressed about work, family responsibilities, and a hurricane threatening his father.

scenes.heading: INT. JODI’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Talia comes to her parents' bed after a nightmare, saying she wants to be older while both parents lie awake.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - HALLWAY BY CONFERENCE ROOM - DAY.
scenes.summary: The team discusses how lawyers tried to break the conspiracy of silence around NDAs, while Gloria Allred defended confidentiality clauses.

scenes.heading: INT. A CAFE. NY. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi meets with Rowena Chiu, who describes the Venice incident off the record and explains her cultural reasons for staying silent.

scenes.heading: INT. A NOODLE BAR. HONG KONG. DAY.
scenes.summary: Young Rowena orders noodles and alcohol in a Hong Kong restaurant while restaurant workers gossip about her in Cantonese.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL LOBBY. HONG KONG. DAY.
scenes.summary: Rowena crosses a Hong Kong hotel lobby, acknowledging the hotel clerk as she heads to the elevator.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL ROOM. HONG KONG. DAY.
scenes.summary: Rowena sits alone in her filthy Hong Kong hotel room, takes a fistful of pills from a pharmacy bag, swallows them with alcohol, then eats soup and noodles.

scenes.heading: INT. LITTLE PARK RESTAURANT. MANHATTAN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi and Irwin finish wine at dinner when Irwin explains his daughter's anger motivated him to speak about Weinstein, and Jodi shows him a typed description from an actress that visibly shocks and upsets him.

scenes.heading: INT. THE MEN’S BATHROOM. LITTLE PARK RESTAURANT. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Irwin stands at the restaurant bathroom sink washing his hands repeatedly, catching himself in the mirror.

scenes.heading: INT. LITTLE PARK RESTAURANT. MANHATTAN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Irwin returns to the table pale, takes his phone and leaves while Jodi remains seated.

scenes.heading: INT. MEGAN AND VADIM’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Megan receives a text message while eating takeaway with her family during a storm, exclaims this might be 'it' and expresses love for Vadim and Jodi.

scenes.heading: INT. A ROOM. THE HAMPTON INN. MANHATTAN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Rebecca reads in her hotel room during the thunderstorm, receives Jodi's text and breathes while taking in the news.

scenes.heading: EXT. A STREET. TRIBECA. MANHATTAN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi walks through torrential rain on a Tribeca street, unbothered by the downpour.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - NEW CONFERENCE ROOM (STAGE). DAY.
scenes.summary: Dean Baquet and Matt Purdy read Lauren O'Connor's memo aloud while Rebecca, Jodi and Megan watch, hearing excerpts about harassment, abuse, and fear of speaking up against Harvey.
scenes.turningPointNote: The team obtains Lauren O'Connor's internal memo documenting Weinstein's harassment, providing crucial written evidence for their investigation.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - JODI’S DESK - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan and Jodi sit at their separate desks typing.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - CONFERENCE ROOM - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Rebecca, Jodi, and Megan conduct a conference call with Lauren O'Connor and her attorney Nicole Page, who states Lauren doesn't want to be named and is too upset to speak.

scenes.heading: EXT. A STREET. NY. DAY./ A STREET. MANHATTAN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan calls Lance Maerov about Lauren O'Connor's memo while walking, and Lance drops his scalding coffee in shock when she mentions it.

scenes.heading: EXT. BRYANT PARK. MANHATTAN. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan aggressively questions Lance Maerov in Bryant Park about the withdrawn memo, and he agrees to go on the record about letting the complaint go after it was withdrawn.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - CAFE - 14TH FL. TWILIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi calls Ashley Judd from the NYT cafe, explaining she'd be coming forward alone but standing on a mountain of evidence, and Ashley says she'll think about it seriously over the weekend.

scenes.heading: EXT. NEW YORK STREETS. MANHATTAN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi walks through New York streets during a tropical storm, nearly blown away by the force of flying debris.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - NEWSROOM CONFERENCE ROOM - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: The editorial team meets in conference as Dean Baquet decides to publish with what they have despite Jodi and Megan wanting to wait for more women to commit on the record.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - 4TH FL. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Rebecca tells Jodi and Megan to go home at midnight, but both continue typing at their desks.

scenes.heading: INT. A CAB. MANHATTAN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Exhausted Megan and Jodi sit in a cab discussing their regrets about not getting women on the record, with Jodi obsessing over needing just one woman while Megan tells her to let it go.

scenes.heading: INT. MEGAN AND VADIM’S APARTMENT. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Megan lies in bed next to sleeping Vadim and Mira, curling up by her daughter and smelling her soft hair while exhausted.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - NEWSROOM CONFERENCE ROOM - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: The editorial team waits two hours for a conference call with Harvey Weinstein and his lawyer Charles Harder, finally connecting at 3:15 PM.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - HALLWAY OUTSIDE NEWSROOM CONF. ROOM - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Reporters pass by the conference room where the call with Weinstein continues, with the clock showing 4:45 PM as the team looks intent and impatient.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - NEWSROOM CONFERENCE ROOM - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: During the call, Weinstein roars about Gwyneth Paltrow while Megan questions him about eight to twelve settlements, and his lawyer disputes the figure.

scenes.heading: EXT. THE COUNTRYSIDE. CALIFORNIA. DAY.
scenes.summary: Ashley Judd runs hard in the California countryside, stops to stretch, looks up at the sky, listens to nature sounds, closes her eyes and prays.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT NEWSROOM - 3RD FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: The exhausted team walks down a corridor as Dean demands corroboration for the settlements figure, Jodi receives a call from Ashley, and everyone watches tensely as she answers.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ashley Judd calls back after her run and prayer, setting up the crucial decision about going on the record.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - JODI’S DESK - 4TH FL. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Jodi and Megan eat takeout while sweating over writing the story late at night.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT LOBBY. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan calls David Glasser from the NYT lobby, giving him a chance to comment as company president.

scenes.heading: INT. A BEDROOM. DAVID GLASSER’S HOUSE. CALIFORNIA. DAWN.
scenes.summary: David Glasser sits on his bed at dawn while his wife sleeps, confirms to Megan that the eight to twelve settlements figure is accurate.
scenes.turningPointNote: David Glasser confirms the crucial eight to twelve settlements figure, providing key corroboration for the story.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - REBECCA’S OFFICE. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan tells Rebecca that David Glasser confirmed the settlements figure, and Rebecca springs up to hug her tightly before sitting back down to write.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - CONFERENCE ROOM - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Dean Baquet takes over a conference call with Lanny Davis, telling him he's sick of dealing with five different lawyers and demanding one response from Weinstein.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - DEAN BAQUET’S OFFICE - 3RD FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: The team reviews Weinstein's eighteen-page email response, with Dean calling it a novel and David McCraw dismissing it as legalistic bullying before sending back three paragraphs.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT LOBBY. DAY.
scenes.summary: Harvey Weinstein arrives at the NYT building with Linda Fairstein, Lisa Bloom and attorney Elkan Abramowitz, while Megan waits by the elevator.

scenes.heading: INT. A CORRIDOR. NYT BUILDING. DAY.
scenes.summary: An editor loiters near a glass office, seeing Weinstein's back, Megan's face, and Weinstein's people in the corridor.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - NEWSROOM CONFERENCE ROOM - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan gives Weinstein's team fifteen minutes to speak while listening to their cacophony of voices calling the women liars and showing pictures of Ashley Judd and McGowan smiling with Harvey.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT ELEVATOR BANK - 3RD FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Megan stands by the elevator bank watching Harvey and his team depart.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Rebecca and Jodi anxiously discover that Harvey and his team have spoken to Variety and the Hollywood Reporter, with both publications running the story online.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - JODI’S DESK - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi and Megan type while editor Rory Tolan works on the language as Rebecca checks over his shoulder.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - 4TH FL. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: The exhausted team stares over Tolan's shoulder as he makes final changes, and Rebecca tells them to go home while she checks the article.

scenes.heading: INT. A CAB. BROOKLYN. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Megan sleeps in the cab while wired Jodi watches her, then lovingly puts her coat over Megan.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - 4TH FL. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Rebecca works alone in the dark office, activating motion sensor lights, pouring tea from a flask, and continuing to edit the article through the night until dawn.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - 4TH FL. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Rebecca continues working through the night, falling asleep briefly at 4:45 AM, then resuming editing at 5:15 AM until leaving at 7 AM.

scenes.heading: INT. A BATHROOM. THE HAMPTON INN. MANHATTAN. MORNING.
scenes.summary: Rebecca soaks her aching fingers and wrists in warm water in her hotel bathroom sink.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Rebecca, Megan and Jodi stand near Tolan when Jodi's phone rings with a call from Laura Madden, and everyone stares at Jodi and the phone.

scenes.heading: EXT. A HOSPITAL WARD. SWANSEA. WALES. DAY.
scenes.summary: Laura Madden calls from a hospital corridor in Wales, telling Jodi she's not gagged by any contract and wants to speak for women who can't, agreeing to go on the record for her three daughters.
scenes.turningPointNote: Laura Madden agrees to go on the record, providing the crucial named source the story desperately needed.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: Jodi embraces Megan after Laura's call, with both women experiencing relief and joy as other reporters notice their strange vision of celebration.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT - NEW CONFERENCE ROOM (STAGE). DAY.
scenes.summary: The team fields another call from Harvey Weinstein who threatens to give an interview to the Washington Post, while Dean Baquet enters and tells Harvey he's about to push the button to publish.
scenes.turningPointNote: Dean Baquet directly confronts Weinstein and announces the imminent publication, marking the final confrontation before the story breaks.

scenes.heading: INT. A HOSPITAL WARD. SWANSEA. DAY.
scenes.summary: Laura is wheeled on a hospital trolley and tells the nurse she's okay, looking up and weeping silently with emotion rather than sadness, appearing released and younger.

scenes.heading: EXT. A BEACH. IRELAND. 1992. DAY.
scenes.summary: A flashback shows 21-year-old Laura laughing and walking on an Irish beach with a girlfriend in 1992.

scenes.heading: INT. A HOTEL ROOM. HONG KONG. DAWN.
scenes.summary: Rowena Chiu lies in fetal position on her Hong Kong hotel bed next to pills and spirits, then gets up, opens the window, and watches a murmuration of starlings flying in the sky.

scenes.heading: INT. NYT INVESTIGATION - 4TH FL. DAY.
scenes.summary: The editorial team reviews Weinstein's final statements and lines up behind Tolan at his computer to examine the completed article, with Dean Baquet declaring it ready to publish after one final read-through.
scenes.turningPointNote: The team completes the article and Dean Baquet declares it ready for publication, marking the culmination of their investigation.

structuralWarnings.text: Act 3 is only 15% of the script — structural placement suspect
